title: gonolobus haitiensis
intro: Gonolobus haitiensis, also known as Haitian milkvine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a perennial climber with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus haitiensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
